author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر عبد الله بن محمد بن أبي شيبة الكوفي العبسي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and compiler, known for his extensive collection of hadith and legal rulings.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: One of the major early hadith collections, widely referenced in Sunni scholarship.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: A foundational work in hadith literature, serving as a primary source for many later scholars.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Kamal Yusuf al-Hut is a respected modern editor known for his meticulous work on classical Islamic texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition is based on multiple manuscripts and includes critical apparatus.
